parameters.name: ResourceGroupFilter
parameters.description: Optional: Filter by resource group name using wildcards. Example: *-prod-* or *hci*
parameters.label: Resource Group Filter

parameters.name: ClusterTagName
parameters.description: Optional: Filter Azure Local clusters by tag name. Select from dropdown or type custom value.
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.azurestackhci/clusters"
| project tags
| mv-expand bagexpansion=array tags
| extend tagName = tostring(tags[0])
| where isnotempty(tagName)
| distinct tagName
| order by tagName asc
parameters.label: Cluster Tag Name

parameters.name: ClusterTagValue
parameters.description: Optional: Filter Azure Local clusters by tag value. Select from dropdown or type custom value.
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.azurestackhci/clusters"
| where '{ClusterTagName}' != ''
| extend tagValue = tostring(tags['{ClusterTagName}'])
| where isnotempty(tagValue)
| distinct tagValue
| order by tagValue asc
parameters.label: Cluster Tag Value

parameters.name: ClusterRGMap
parameters.description: Hidden: maps resource group to cluster name for HCI clusters
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.azurestackhci/clusters"
| where '{ResourceGroupFilter}' == '' or resourceGroup matches regex strcat('(?i)', replace_string(replace_string('{ResourceGroupFilter}', '*', '.*'), '?', '.'))
| where '{ClusterTagName}' == '' or ('{ClusterTagValue}' != '' and tostring(tags['{ClusterTagName}']) =~ '{ClusterTagValue}')
| project value = strcat(tolower(resourceGroup), ':', name)
| summarize result = make_list(value)
| project value = tostring(result)
